title: ASR Outdoor 4.5 In Clay Target Disc Thrower Right and Left Handed (19 In Long)
description:
Are you an avid clay target shooter? Then you need the ASR Outdoor clay target disc thrower for on-the-go target practice! This manual disc thrower fits universal standard 4.5” clay targets, making this an excellent option for skeet, range, and backyard target shooting. Designed for both long and short-distance shooting, you can use this convenient disc thrower both indoors and outdoors. Take it out when you go hunting or camping for extra practice. It’s also built to be used by both left and right-handers and has a lightweight, portable and durable design with an overall 19” handle length

ASR Outdoor 4.5 In Clay Target Disc Thrower Right and Left Handed (19 In Long)

Are you an avid clay target shooter? Then you need the ASR Outdoor clay target disc thrower for on-the-go target practice! This manual disc thrower fits universal standard 4.5” clay targets, making this an excellent option for skeet, range, and backyard target shooting.

Key Features

  • CLAY TARGET DISC THROWER - ASR Outdoor manual disc thrower fits universal standard 4.5” clay targets; great for skeet, range, garden, backyard and camping target shooting
  • LONG AND SHORT DISTANCE - Designed for both long and short distance target shooting indoors and outdoors; ideal hunting and camping target practice accessory
  • LEFT AND RIGHT HANDED - Built to be used by both left and right-handers; lightweight, portable and durable design; 19” overall handle length is easy to use for men and women
  • HIGH VISIBILITY - Comes in bright, super-visible contrast orange that is easier to see down range; safely throw at any speed indoors or outdoors
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: plastic; Color: high-visibility orange; Handle length: 19”; Clay target fit: 4.5” standard/universal; Left and right-handed; Indoor and outdoor; Short and long distance

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ORGDSTHR19
  • UPC: 810058482280
  • Color: Orange
  • Size: 19 in

Designed for both long and short-distance shooting, you can use this convenient disc thrower both indoors and outdoors. Take it out when you go hunting or camping for extra practice. It’s also built to be used by both left and right-handers and has a lightweight, portable and durable design with an overall 19” handle length.

In addition, the disc launcher comes in a bright, high-contrast orange color that is easier to see down range than similar throwers, making it a safer choice to throw at any speed, indoors or outdoors. This is a great option for beginners, intermediate, and even experienced target shooters!
